features.title: Why RideYo?
features.subtitle: All the services you need for a modern mobile rental experience in one platform.

fastBooking.title: Fast Booking
fastBooking.description: Create a reservation in a few steps, complete payment, and hit the road.

flexiblePricing.title: Flexible Pricing
flexiblePricing.description: Choose from minute, hourly, and daily rentals with kilometer packages.

fuelSupport.title: Fuel Support
fuelSupport.description: Fuel costs are covered by us on selected rental plans.

secureExperience.title: Secure Experience
secureExperience.description: Drive safely with identity verification, insurance options, and a well-maintained fleet.

access247.title: 24/7 Access
access247.description: Book anytime and reach our support team whenever you need.

mobileFirst.title: Mobile First
mobileFirst.description: Manage everything from your phone — map, payment, and rental in one app.

about.title: About RideYo
about.description: RideYo is a mobile platform digitizing the car rental experience across Turkey. We are with you with a reliable fleet, transparent pricing, and user-focused service.
advantages: Options for different needs with a wide vehicle fleet
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
Comprehensive insurance and additional driver options
Fast booking, digital verification, and easy handover
about.quote: We combine technology and service so every journey is safe, easy, and predictable.

howItWorks.title: Rent in 4 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, fast, and fully digital rental experience.

createAccount.title: Create Your Account
createAccount.description: Sign up and complete your identity and driver's license verification.

chooseCar.title: Choose Your Car
chooseCar.description: Find the best car for you on the map or list.

startBooking.title: Start Your Booking
startBooking.description: Complete payment and access the car with a digital key.

driveSafely.title: Drive Safely
driveSafely.description: Use the car during your rental period and return it when done.

reservationSteps.title: Reservation Process
reservationSteps.subtitle: Create your reservation in a few steps. The entire process is managed through the mobile app.

carSelection.title: Car Selection
carSelection.description: Filter by price, location, and car type to find the right vehicle.

duration.title: Set Duration
duration.description: Plan minute, hourly, or daily rental based on your needs.

pickup.title: Pickup Point
pickup.description: Choose pickup and drop-off locations to finalize your route.

insurance.title: Insurance & Extras
insurance.description: Configure insurance packages and optional additional driver options.

payment.title: Secure Payment
payment.description: Complete the transaction through secure payment infrastructure with your card.

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmation
confirmation.description: After approval, your reservation details appear in your account.

nearby.title: Nearby Vehicles
nearby.noCarsNearby: No available cars nearby. View all vehicles.

chatbot.title: RideYo Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hello! Welcome to RideYo. How can I help you?
chatbot.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
chatbot.serviceUnavailable: Service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
chatbot.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
